name: medicalclinic-system-v2
description: Medical Clinic Management System for Bukidnon State University
author: BukSU

scripts.build: npm run install-backend && npm run install-frontend && npm run build-frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.desktop: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.dist-app: cross-env CSC_SKIP=true npm run build-frontend && electron-builder
